text: WarMonitor A former WH nuclear official says Trump’s claim Iran’s program was “destroyed” is “just not true,” noting Iran still has enough highly enriched uranium for roughly 10–11 nuclear bombs. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046056959623766383/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一位前白宫核官员表示，特朗普关于伊朗核计划已被“摧毁”的说法“根本不是事实”，并指出伊朗目前仍拥有足以制造约 10 至 11 枚核弹的高浓缩铀。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046056959623766383/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A tank farm at Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery and export terminal is heavily ablaze following a large-scale Ukrainian drone attack, reports say. @Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046055843624276268/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据报道，在乌克兰发动大规模无人机袭击后，俄罗斯图阿普谢（Tuapse）炼油厂和出口终端的一个储油罐区燃起大火。 @Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046055843624276268/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 TankerTrackers: Iranian linked tankers that have yet to be sanctioned by the U.S. Office of Foreign Asset Control continue to move freely in and out of the Strait of Hormuz. There are approximatley 236 known Iran linked thankers that have still not been sanctioned. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 TankerTrackers：尚未受到美国外国资产控制办公室制裁的伊朗相关油轮继续在霍尔木兹海峡自由进出。目前大约有 236 艘已知的伊朗相关油轮尚未受到制裁。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺Ukrainian drones have targeted the Tuapse oil refinery, in Russia’s Krasnodar Krai region, this evening. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Residents of Tuapse, Krasnodar Krai region, record the massive scale of the fire at the oil refinery after a Ukrainian drone strike. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦🇷🇺今晚，乌克兰无人机袭击了位于俄罗斯克拉斯诺达尔边疆区的图阿普谢炼油厂。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 克拉斯诺达尔边疆区图阿普谢的居民记录了乌克兰无人机袭击后炼油厂火灾的巨大规模。@wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender Rosneft’s Tuapse Oil Depot and Export Facility in Krasnodar Krai, Russia, is currently ablaze, with dozens of tanks seen burning as thick black smoke pours into the sky, following a large-scale drone attack tonight by Ukraine against oil infrastructure across Southern Russia. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046049891307163918/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 俄罗斯克拉斯诺达尔边疆区的俄罗斯石油公司图阿普谢油库和出口设施目前正燃起大火，可以看到数十个储油罐在燃烧，浓浓的黑烟冲向天空。此前，乌克兰今晚对俄罗斯南部的石油基础设施发动了大规模无人机袭击。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2046049891307163918/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The tank farm at Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery and export terminal is heavily ablaze tonight after a massive Ukrainian drone attack. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046048669086916756/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在乌克兰发动大规模无人机袭击后，俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂和出口码头的储油区今晚燃起大火。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046048669086916756/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Energy Secretary Wright says that gas prices might not go below $3 a gallon until 2027, but believes that once the conflict ends prices across the board will go down. Interviewer: "When do you think it's realistic for Americans to expect that gas will go back to under $3 a gallon?" Wright: "I don't know. That could happen later this year. That might not happen till next year. But prices have likely peaked, and they'll start going down. Certainly, with the resolution of this conflict, you'll see prices go down. Prices across the board on energy prices will go down." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国能源部长赖特表示，汽油价格在2027年之前可能不会降至每加仑3美元以下，但他相信一旦冲突结束，全面价格将会下降。采访者：“您认为美国人什么时候可以现实地预期汽油价格会回到每加仑3美元以下？”赖特：“我不知道。这可能在今年晚些时候发生。也可能要到明年。但价格很可能已经见顶，并将开始下降。当然，随着这场冲突的解决，你会看到价格下降。能源价格将全面下降。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran’s First Vice President says restricting Iran’s oil exports while expecting open passage is unsustainable, warning of rising costs if pressure continues. Meanwhile, maritime traffic in the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz remains heavily disrupted, with tanker movements sharply reduced and near a standstill. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗第一副总统表示，在限制伊朗石油出口的同时期望航道畅通是不可持续的，并警告如果压力持续，成本将会上升。与此同时，波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的海上交通仍然严重中断，油轮运输量大幅减少，几乎处于停滞状态。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇦 💥 An infrastructure facility was hit in Krivoy Rog, the local administration reports 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 据当地政府报告，克里沃罗格的一处基础设施遭到袭击 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇺🇸 加拿大总理卡尼表示，与美国的关系已成为加拿大的软肋。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇱 Kamala Harris: Trump got pulled into a war by Bibi Netanyahu. Let’s be clear about that. He entered a war that the American people do not want, putting U.S. service members at risk. Note: She and President Biden enabled Israeli Genocide in Gaza for…" ✡️ 🇺🇸 This is the problem in America: whether Democrat or Republican, Jewish lobbies have both on a chokehold. She’s talking like this because she knows public opinion is shifting, and Americans no longer support Israel. Being pro-Israel at the polls is political suicide for the first time in U.S. history. If, God forbid, she is reelected, expect her to go back to the same exact pro-Israel policies. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇱 卡玛拉·哈里斯：特朗普被比比·内塔尼亚胡拖入了战争。我们要明确这一点。他卷入了一场美国人民不想要的战争，使美国军人处于危险之中。注：她和拜登总统在加沙促成了以色列的种族灭绝……” ✡️ 🇺🇸 这就是美国的问题所在：无论是民主党还是共和党，都受到犹太游说团体的钳制。她之所以这样说，是因为她知道公众舆论正在转变，美国人不再支持以色列。在美国历史上，支持以色列在选举中首次成为政治自杀行为。如果她不幸连任，预计她会回到完全相同的亲以色列政策。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text_zh: The Spectator Index 🇯🇵 尽管油价飙升，日本日经225指数仍上涨超过1%。 tweet

text: WarMonitor Judge warns ICE’s use of “after-the-fact” arrest warrants risks turning the U.S. into a “police state,” calling the practice illegal and unconstitutional. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046044687534886942/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 法官警告称，美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）使用“事后”逮捕令的做法有使美国变成“警察国家”的风险，并称这种做法是非法且违宪的。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046044687534886942/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Southern Command (SOUTHCOM), earlier today, at the direction of SOUTHCOM Commander General Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a strike on a vessel in known narco-trafficking routes in the Caribbean. The vessel was operated by a designated terrorist organization. Three narco-terrorists were killed in the strike. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国南方司令部（SOUTHCOM）发布的消息，今天早些时候，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万（Francis L. Donovan）将军的指挥下，南方之矛联合特遣部队对加勒比海已知毒品走私路线上的一艘船只进行了打击。该船只由一个指定的恐怖组织运营。三名毒品恐怖分子在袭击中被击毙。 tweet

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Southern Command: "On April 19, at the direction of SOUTHCOM commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations. Intelligence confirmed the vessel was transiting along known narco-trafficking routes in the Caribbean and was engaged in narco-trafficking operations. Three male narco-terrorists were killed during this action. No U.S. military forces were harmed. " tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国南方司令部：“4月19日，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万将军的指挥下，南方之矛联合特遣部队对一艘由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了致命的动能打击。情报证实，该船只正沿加勒比海已知的毒品走私路线航行，并参与了毒品走私活动。三名男性毒品恐怖分子在此次行动中被击毙。没有美国军事人员受伤。” tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 Peru presidential candidate Rafael López Aliaga called on supporters to take to the streets on April 19 in Lima, urging mass turnout “to defend democracy” and protest the election results. The right-wing candidate, currently polling in third place, has…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 Pro-Aliaga protesters gathered in Lima demanding new elections and alleging the current vote is rigged, as Aliaga remains in third place. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 秘鲁总统候选人拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿利亚加呼吁支持者于 4 月 19 日走上利马街头，敦促民众大规模参与‘捍卫民主’并抗议选举结果。这位目前民调排名第三的右翼候选人已经……” ⚡️ 🇵🇪 支持阿利亚加的抗议者聚集在利马，要求重新选举并声称目前的投票存在舞弊，而阿利亚加目前仍排名第三。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. Ambassador to the UN Waltz argues that critical infrastructure in Iran is a legitmate military target. "And by the way, bridges, power plants that are run by the IRGC, which runs the entire military, are absolute legitimate military targets, not only now, but have been historically. That is a false, fake, and ridiculous notion that this is some type of war crime." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇳 🇮🇷 美国驻联合国大使沃尔兹认为，伊朗的关键基础设施是合法的军事目标。“顺便说一句，由伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）运营的桥梁和发电厂——该组织管理着整个军队——绝对是合法的军事目标，不仅现在是，历史上也是如此。认为这是某种战争罪行的说法是虚假、伪造且荒谬的。”@wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index Japanese companies are being forced to 'cut back on production and scramble for alternative supply sources' for aluminium due to Iran war, according to Bloomberg report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据彭博社报道，由于伊朗战争，日本公司被迫“削减产量并争相寻找替代供应源”以获取铝。推文

text: WarMonitor Iran says it has launched drone attacks at U.S. military ships in retaliation for the U.S. striking and seizing an Iranian cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz. (Tasnim) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊朗称，为报复美国在霍尔木兹海峡打击并扣押一艘伊朗货船，伊朗已对美国军舰发动无人机袭击。（塔斯尼姆通讯社）推文

text: WarMonitor Before the war, the Strait of Hormuz was open, now an Iranian politician says Iran will never give up control of it. (BBC) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046026961248506175/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 战前，霍尔木兹海峡是开放的，现在一位伊朗政客表示，伊朗永远不会放弃对它的控制。（BBC）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046026961248506175/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @FaytuksNetwork : Ukraine has launched one of its most successful drone attacks of the war, with over two dozen explosions reported in the Russian port city of Tuapse. The city is located on the Black Sea and is home to a major oil export facility. It was previously targeted in a smaller attack on April 16. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @FaytuksNetwork ：乌克兰发动了战争中最成功的无人机袭击之一，据报道俄罗斯港口城市图阿普谢发生了二十多次爆炸。该市位于黑海，拥有一个主要的石油出口设施。此前曾在4月16日遭到过一次较小规模的袭击。推文

text: WarMonitor I'm sure the feeling is mutual, especially now. U.N. Ambassador Mike Waltz says U.S. is "never going to take an approach of trust" with Iran https://cbsn.ws/4ey0cDr - CBS News tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇭 🇹🇭 Cambodia has formally protested Thailand over alleged military activities along their shared border, accusing Thai forces of construction and land clearing to consolidate what it called an “illegal occupation.” Cambodia urged Thailand to halt the actions and warned they violate sovereignty and international agreements. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇭 🇹🇭 柬埔寨就泰国在其共同边界沿线的所谓军事活动正式向泰国提出抗议，指责泰军进行建设和土地清理，以巩固其所谓的“非法占领”。柬埔寨敦促泰国停止这些行动，并警告称这些行动违反了主权和国际协议。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: Netanyahu and Javier Milei, President of Argentina, announced today the launch of the "Isaac Accord." The Isaac Accord is a strategic framework aimed at strengthening military & intelligence cooperation between Argentina, Israel, and soon in all countries in South America. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🌕🚀 Artemis II returns to Earth and splashes down near San Diego after a successful trip around the moon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🌕 While aboard Artemis II, astronaut Reid Wiseman filmed on his phone the Earth setting behind the Moon, or an “Earthset”. @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Operation “Economic Fury” has been ongoing for 5+ days Iran is losing at least $438 million per day per FDD As I said before, the regime can only sustain this max for 30 days. This week the squeeze is going to hit. tweet

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "A U.S. Sailor signals to an F/A-18E Super Hornet as it prepares to launch from the flight deck of USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) during U.S. naval blockade operations in regional waters." Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046019976364978633/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）：“一名美国水兵向一架F/A-18E超级大黄蜂战斗机发出信号，该机正准备从亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（CVN 72）的飞行甲板上起飞，执行美国在区域水域的海上封锁行动。” 由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046019976364978633/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command A U.S. Sailor signals to an F/A-18E Super Hornet as it prepares to launch from the flight deck of USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) during U.S. naval blockade operations in regional waters. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2046019761927004258/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 一名美国水兵向一架F/A-18E超级大黄蜂战斗机发出信号，该机正准备从亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（CVN 72）的飞行甲板上起飞，执行美国在区域水域的海上封锁行动。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2046019761927004258/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index US crude oil is now up 8% so far today amid rising US-Iran tensions. tweet
text_zh: 旁观者指数 受美伊紧张局势加剧影响，美国原油价格今日迄今已上涨8%。推文

text: OSINTtechnical The UAE has opened talks with the U.S. about obtaining a financial backstop in case the Iran war plunges the oil-rich Persian Gulf state into a deeper crisis -U.S. officials to the WSJ tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 阿联酋已与美国展开谈判，寻求在伊朗战争导致这个石油资源丰富的波斯湾国家陷入更深层危机时获得财政支持——美国官员向《华尔街日报》透露。推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo, when he addressed the Iranian protester kiIIings in January: “My thoughts turn to the situation currently unfolding in the Middle East, especially in Iran and Syria, where ongoing tensions continue to claim many lives. I hope and pray that dialogue and peace may be patiently nurtured in pursuit of the common good of the whole of society.” REPORTER: Iran is going to execute four more protesters, including the first woman protester. What do you tell Iran? TRUMP: Tell that to the Pope https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044842864174096505/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报教皇方济各在1月份谈到伊朗抗议者被杀事件时说：“我的思绪转向目前在中东，特别是在伊朗和叙利亚展开的局势，持续的紧张局势继续夺走许多生命。我希望并祈祷，为了整个社会的共同利益，能够耐心地培育对话与和平。”记者：伊朗将再处决四名抗议者，其中包括第一位女性抗议者。您对伊朗有什么话要说？特朗普：去告诉教皇吧 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044842864174096505/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Ship should have just turned around, if it’s trouble, it’s going to get exposed to the world. Xi promised Trump no weapons are being sent to Iran. We will soon know Iran: The vessel struck by U.S. forces was traveling from China to Iran - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报这艘船本应该直接掉头，如果它有麻烦，它就会暴露在全世界面前。习近平向特朗普承诺不会向伊朗运送武器。我们很快就会知道伊朗：被美军袭击的船只当时正从中国前往伊朗 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel A few questions and thoughts: The U.S. says it warned the vessel for 6 hours. Why didn’t it stop? Was it carrying weapons or dual use materials? Did the crew think a China route gave them protection? Was this a deliberate test of the blockade? Will the U.S. reveal what was actually on board? Iran: The vessel struck by U.S. forces was traveling from China to Iran - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报几个问题和想法：美国称其对该船只发出了6小时的警告。为什么它没有停下来？它携带的是武器还是军民两用物资？船员是否认为中国航线能为他们提供保护？这是对封锁的蓄意测试吗？美国会披露船上到底装了什么吗？伊朗：被美军袭击的船只当时正从中国前往伊朗 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran: The vessel struck by U.S. forces was traveling from China to Iran tweet
text_zh: 开源情报伊朗：被美军袭击的船只当时正从中国前往伊朗推文

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "Hebrew Media: The IDF is investigating a case in which a soldier was recorded beheading a statue of Jesus Christ in a village in southern Lebanon. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench" IDF confirm soldier beheaded Jesus figure in South of Lebanon but say it is 'wholly inconsistent with values of troops' 'IDF has NO INTENTION of HARMING civilian infrastructure or religious symbols'
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“希伯来媒体：以色列国防军正在调查一起案件，一名士兵在黎巴嫩南部的一个村庄被录下斩首耶稣基督雕像的视频。🚩 @RezistanceTrench” 以色列国防军证实士兵在黎巴嫩南部斩首了耶稣雕像，但称这“完全不符合部队的价值观”，“以色列国防军无意伤害民用基础设施或宗教象征”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukrainian drones have targeted the Tuapse oil refinery, in Russia’s Krasnodar Krai region, this evening. @wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index US crude oil price is now up over 7.5% and trading at over $90. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国原油价格现已上涨超过7.5%，交易价格超过90美元。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT ELINT News RT @IDF: Following the completion of an initial examination regarding a photograph published earlier today of an IDF soldier harming a Christian symbol, it was determined that the photograph depicts an IDF soldier operating in southern Lebanon. The IDF views the incident with great severity and emphasizes that the soldier’s conduct is wholly inconsistent with the values expected of its troops. The incident is being investigated by the Northern Command and is currently being addressed through the chain of command. Appropriate measures will be taken against those involved in accordance with the findings. Furthermore, the IDF is working to assist the community in restoring the statue to its place. The IDF is operating to dismantle the terrorist infrastructure established by Hezbollah in southern Lebanon, and has no intention of harming civilian infrastructure, including religious buildings or religious symbols. The IDF is currently examining the reliability of the photograph. If this is indeed a real, recent picture, these actions do not align with the IDF's values ​​and the behavior expected of IDF soldiers. The incident will be investigated thoroughly and in depth, and if necessary, steps will be taken in accordance with the findings. - LTC Nadav Shoshani tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT ELINT News RT @IDF：在对今天早些时候发布的一张以色列国防军士兵损坏基督教象征的照片进行初步审查后，确定该照片描绘的是一名在黎巴嫩南部行动的以色列国防军士兵。以色列国防军非常严肃地看待这一事件，并强调该士兵的行为完全不符合对其部队所期望的价值观。该事件正由北方司令部进行调查，目前正通过指挥链进行处理。将根据调查结果对相关人员采取适当措施。此外，以色列国防军正在努力协助社区将雕像恢复原位。以色列国防军正在努力拆除真主党在黎巴嫩南部建立的恐怖基础设施，无意伤害包括宗教建筑或宗教象征在内的民用基础设施。以色列国防军目前正在审查该照片的真实性。如果这确实是一张真实的、近期的照片，这些行为不符合以色列国防军的价值观以及对以色列国防军士兵所期望的行为。该事件将得到彻底和深入的调查，如有必要，将根据调查结果采取措施。- 中校 Nadav Shoshani 推文
